reasoning: 30e053248da.c L26: 'if (error)' claimed to read error without initialization. However, error IS initialized at L24: 'error = security_old_inode_init_security(length);' which always executes and assigns a return value. Pulse false positive matching TRANSFORMATION_27 (same file, same location, FALSE). PC=true is also inaccurate (function not in any #ifdef so true is reasonable), but the alarm itself is incorrect since error is always initialized before L26.
